'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 115''' is the one hundred fifteenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[May 7]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[The Monster's Secret!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[The Monster's Secret!]]"
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Man-Wolf Part 2: Who are Man-Wolf's mystery assailants? And why are they in the Space Station?"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 25: Confessions of a demolished man!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Miracle on Rrorgo!"
